order.label: PRO Opening
order.job: Deliver your OPENING: state your strongest case for your side of the motion. Build the frame. Do not rebut yet — there is nothing to rebut.

order.label: CON Opening
order.job: Deliver your OPENING: state your strongest case for your side of the motion. Build the frame. Do not rebut yet.

order.label: CON Rebuttal
order.job: Deliver your REBUTTAL: attack the specific weak points in your opponent's opening. Name what they claimed and dismantle it. This is where the debate sharpens.

order.label: PRO Rebuttal
order.job: Deliver your REBUTTAL: answer the attack on your case and strike the weak points in theirs. Name what they claimed and dismantle it.

order.label: PRO Closing
order.job: Deliver your CLOSING: crystallise why your side won the clash. NO new arguments — that is a debate foul. Land the case you already built.

order.label: CON Closing
order.job: Deliver your CLOSING: crystallise why your side won the clash. NO new arguments — that is a debate foul. Land the case you already built.
